server_info.name: arifOS MCP
server_info.description: Public unified gateway for arifOS 20-tool constitutional MCP (arifOS + GEOX + WEALTH organs). No client authentication required.

tools.name: arifos_init
tools.description: Initialize constitutional session with identity binding and telemetry seed. Modes: init/probe/state/status | revoke requires human_approval.

tools.description: Reality-grounded observation capture with OBS/INT/DER epistemic labels.

gateway_note: This is the public discovery endpoint. All tools are accessible without auth.
